findings.area: agenda row — I dag 18:00, Sjakk-NM 2026 – eliteklassen
findings.issue: Channel label truncates to 'Direktesport ...' with no way to see the rest.

Same channel label still truncates to 'Direktesport (grati...' even at 900px full-page width, so this isn't a narrow-viewport space constraint — the channel column truncates regardless of available width, hiding the qualifier (looks like a '(gratis)'/free-access note).

findings.area: agenda row — lørdag 11. juli 17:00, Wimbledon 2026: Damefinale
findings.issue: Channel label truncates to 'HBO Max (fi...' hiding the rest of the qualifier text.
Same row truncates to 'HBO Max (finale g...' at 900px — confirms the channel-column truncation is width-independent, not mobile-specific.

notes: Team-name truncation flagged in the previous run (2026-07-04) for 'United States – Belgium' and 'Switzerland – Colombia' is gone today — both fixtures now wrap to a second line and show the full opponent name at 375 and 393px.

Norwegian-channel contract holds: only NRK, TV 2 Play, NRK / TV 2, Viaplay and Max (HBO Max) appear as broadcasters at all three widths — no foreign broadcaster (ESPN/FOX/Sky) seen. HBO Max/Max is the correct rights holder for Wimbledon per the norwegian-rights skill, so this is not a foreign-broadcaster flag, just a truncation issue.
Flags and sport icons render correctly everywhere — no broken image icons or empty boxes.
Round labels (Åttedelsfinale, Kvartfinale) display correctly next to knockout fixtures.
No horizontal scroll or edge clipping observed at 375px; layout stays a single quiet column with generous spacing at all widths.
Header, day-group headings, 'Hva vi følger' disclosure, and footer (Oppdatert / Legg til i kalender / AI-budsjett line) are all intact and aligned at every width.
Must-see accent (orange ring on the sport icon) is used sparingly — only John Deere Classic and Brazil – Norway on the first day carry it, not applied to every row.
Placeholder bracket fixtures ('Round of 16 5 Winner – Round of 16 6 Winner') read as generic text, but that's expected since those slots aren't decided yet — not a visual bug today.
